methods.name: Initialize
methods.description: Initialize the sender with your server URL and secret key. Call this once at app startup. serverUrl: full URL to deployed web-app. secretKey: must match SECRET_KEY in your script.

methods.name: SendDataToTopic
methods.description:
Sends a data-only message to all devices subscribed to a topic.
No notification is shown automatically — the app handles display.
Delivered to MessageReceived event on all subscribed devices.
.
===============================================================
.
Parameters:
  • topic    — FCM topic name (without /topics/ prefix)
  • data     — Dictionary of key-value pairs
  • callback — procedure(success, messageId, error)

methods.name: SendDataToToken
methods.description:
Sends a data-only message to a single device token.
No notification is shown automatically — the app handles display.
Delivered to MessageReceived event on the target device.
.
===============================================================
.
Parameters:
  • token    — FCM registration token of target device
  • data     — Dictionary of key-value pairs
  • callback — procedure(success, messageId, error)

methods.name: SendDataToMultipleTokens
methods.description:
Sends a data-only message to multiple device tokens (up to 500).
No notification is shown automatically — the app handles display.
Delivered to MessageReceived event on each target device.
.
===============================================================
.
Parameters:
  • tokens   — List of FCM registration token strings
  • data     — Dictionary of key-value pairs
  • callback — procedure(success, messageId, error)
               messageId contains summary e.g. '5/5 sent'

methods.name: SendNotificationToTopic
methods.description:
Sends a notification message to all devices subscribed to a topic.
Notification is built and shown by the receiver extension.
Delivered to NotificationReceived event on all subscribed devices.
.
===============================================================
.
Parameters:
  • topic              — FCM topic name (without /topics/ prefix)
  • smallIcon          — Small icon for status bar (Full HTTPS image URL or image in asset)
  • notificationStyle  — Notification style (basic, big text, big picture, individual/group message)
  • extraData          — Dictionary of extra key-value pairs
  • callback           — procedure(success, messageId, error)

methods.name: SendNotificationToToken
methods.description:
Sends a notification to a single device token.
Notification is built and shown by the receiver extension.
Delivered to NotificationReceived event on the target device.
.
===============================================================
.
Parameters:
  • token        — FCM registration token of target device
  • smallIcon          — Small icon for status bar (Full HTTPS image URL or image in asset)
  • notificationStyle  — Notification style (basic, big text, big picture, individual/group message)
  • extraData          — Dictionary of extra key-value pairs
  • callback           — procedure(success, messageId, error)

methods.name: SendNotificationToMultipleTokens
methods.description:
Sends a notification to multiple device tokens (up to 500).
Notification is built and shown by the receiver extension on each device.
Delivered to NotificationReceived event on each target device.
.
===============================================================
.
Parameters:
  • tokens             — List of FCM registration token strings
  • smallIcon          — Small icon for status bar (Full HTTPS image URL or image in asset)
  • notificationStyle  — Notification style (basic, big text, big picture, individual/group message)
  • extraData          — Dictionary of extra key-value pairs
  • callback           — procedure(success, messageId, error)

methods.name: CreateBasicStyle
methods.description: Creates a basic notification style dictionary configuration payload.

methods.name: CreateBigTextStyle
methods.description: Creates an expanded big text style dictionary configuration payload.

methods.name: CreateBigPictureStyle
methods.description: Creates an expanded big picture style dictionary configuration payload.

methods.name: CreateIndividualMessageStyle
methods.description: Creates an individual 1-on-1 MessagingStyle notification dictionary configuration layout.

methods.name: CreateGroupMessageStyle
methods.description: Creates a persistent group MessagingStyle notification dictionary configuration layout.

blockProperties.name: ServerUrl
blockProperties.description: Deployed web app url of google app-script

blockProperties.name: SecretKey
blockProperties.description: Secret key that matches SECRET_KEY in your script

name: FCMSender
helpString: FCM Sender Extension — sends push notifications via your server backend using HTTP v1 API layouts.
